  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"API used to get the list of Programs that feeds the UpdateProgramInfo page"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/report/updateProgramInfo/programTypeId/{programTypeId}/realmCountryId/{realmCountryId}/active/{active}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>
